block_range_recovered.note: Receipt recovery is transaction-based, not a contiguous archive-node eth_getLogs pass.

data_recovery_method: PolygonScan auction-house normal transaction pages plus public Polygon RPC transaction receipts

dog1_ukraine_auction.source_note: Medium article published by Degen Dogs on 2022-03-14 states Dog #1 / Ukraine Dog was a 72h special auction with 100% donation.
dog1_ukraine_auction.status: verified_from_medium_and_receipt_logs_for_dog1_presence; donation flow still needs full treasury/Ukraine reconciliation

dogmaster_reward_rule.rule: Dog.sol mints a dogMaster reward Dog at token ID 0 and every 11th Dog while lastId <= 420, then mints the auction Dog.

dune.notes: No Mission 1 Dune query/dashboard export is committed in this archive. Add query IDs/results under archive/mission1/dune/ when available.

known_gaps.reason: AuctionCreated rows without recovered AuctionSettled rows for Dog IDs: 200

polygon_dogs_claim_201_reconciliation.docs_claim: 201 Dogs joined the club on Polygon before Mission 2, per current docs/public context.
polygon_dogs_claim_201_reconciliation.notes: Dog NFT totalSupply() returned 201 and receipt-backed NFT mint transfers cover token IDs 0-200. Dog.sol explains non-auction IDs as dogMaster reward IDs: 0 and every 11th Dog. AuctionCreated rows cover all expected non-reward auction IDs through 200. Dog 200 is created but has no recovered settlement and the latest auction() state shows dogId 200, amount 0, settled false.
